Description: Defines a target for jumps and calls.
Unconditionally jumps to the specified label.
Declares a variable (or updates it) with a numeric value.
Adds a numeric value to the specified variable.
Subtracts a numeric value from the specified variable.
Compares a variable's value against a target number.
Jumps to label if the previous CMP was Equal.
Jumps to label if the previous CMP was Not Equal.
Jumps to label if the previous CMP was Less.
Jumps to label if the previous CMP was Greater.
Reads a key from the keyboard buffer into the variable (0 if none).
Prints a literal string or variable value at (X Y).
Draws a filled rectangle inside the window.
Clears the window back to the default background color.
Pauses execution for the specified time.
Terminates the task and cleans up its memory.
